Job description

Hello,

I'm Akash from Hudson Manpower, reaching out to discuss an exciting opportunity with our client. Would you kindly review the job description and inform me of your comfort level with it? Additionally, could you please share an updated copy of your resume?

Title : Android Developer

Location : Hybrid role in Houston, TX.(1 Day Onsite 4days Remote)

Terms : Long Term Contract

***ONLY US Citizens and GC Candidates can apply***

Payrate - $40/hr on W2

Top Skill set:

Proficiency in Java/Kotlin programming languages for Android app development.

Understanding of the Android SDK, including UI design principles, layout constraints, and material design guidelines.

Experience with RESTful APIs and integration of web services into Android applications.

Familiarity with version control systems such as Git for code collaboration and management.

Ability to troubleshoot and debug Android applications across different devices and OS versions.

Regards

Akash

Job requirements

Proficiency in Java/Kotlin programming languages for Android app development.
